title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete UI
scenario: Account tab under General in App Settings does not display delete icon below Log out button as per Figma design
steps: Tap on the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings
Scroll down to locate the Log out button
Check below the Log out button for a delete icon
expected: A delete icon is displayed below the Log out button in the Account tab, matching the Figma design.
